name: Animal Justice Party
summary: Australian political party campaigning for stronger legal protection for animals, people and the environment.
description: Useful for tracking parliamentary animal-law policy, election commitments and reform pressure across Australian jurisdictions.
alignment: Listed because its animal law and policy work overlaps with Bite Back campaign targets, while Bite Back remains a separate public-interest project.

image.alt: Dark Bite Back-style friend image for Animal Justice Party with legal and parliamentary reference marks.
